reviews.review_title: Intense VR Roguelike With Tons of Potent
reviews.review_description: Man, this game is intense. First time I’ve ever played a roguelike in VR and it’s kinda blowing my mind. The content’s pretty limited right now and the tutorial is on the bare-bones side, but the gameplay itself is super thrilling—I’ve already died twice lol. Really curious if there are gonna be more weapons later on.

OMG!! Just cracked Top 3 on the board, I'm literally GOATED!! 🔥 Give me a sec and I'm taking that #1 spot, it's MINE!!

No cap, this game is different. I played all the other monke games and they all mid fr fr 💀. This one actually takes SKILL. Being a gorilla with a strapped and clappin' monsters left and right is crazy!! 🔫💥

I’m locked in now. Number one better stay awake cuz I'm coming!! See y'all at the top!! LFG!!! 🦍🏆

Didn’t expect much, ended up playing for over an hour. The movement feels wild at first but once it clicks, it really clicks. Shooting while flinging yourself around as a gorilla is way more fun than it sounds.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much! That 'click' moment with the movement is exactly what we aimed for. 🦍 It definitely has a learning curve, but once you master the momentum, you really feel like a powerful gorilla! So glad it exceeded your expectations

reviews.review_title: Best VR Shooter Yet, No Cap.
reviews.review_description: Yo, this VR roguelike is straight fire, fam! No cap, it’s pure chaos and the movement’s got me goin’ full ape. The tutorial’s light, but these upgrades are addictive as heck. I’ve been catching' L's left and right, but I’m finna keep grindin' regardless. This game’s got crazy potential, real talk!

reviews.review_title: Absolute blast! The perfect mix of Goril
reviews.review_description:
"I’ve played a lot of VR games, but Gorilla Gun: Survivor is easily one of the most addictive experiences I’ve had lately. The movement system is heavily inspired by Gorilla Tag, which makes swinging through the arenas feel incredibly fluid and satisfying.

What really keeps me coming back is the roguelike loop. Every run feels fresh because of the randomized weapon upgrades and ability synergies you can build. One minute you’re a slow-moving tank with massive firepower, and the next you’re a high-speed monkey dodging projectiles while your auto-turrets do the work. The 'just one more round' feeling is real! If you love survivor-style games and want a workout while you play, this is a must-buy. 10/10 would swing and shoot again!"

If you love the movement from Gorilla Tag but want more action, this is it. Swinging around while blasting waves of enemies feels incredible. It's a massive workout and the roguelike upgrades are super addictive. My arms are sore, but I can't stop playing. 10/10 would swing and shoot again!

This is such a cool roguelike survivor game! I honestly didn’t expect to play something like this in VR!
The gorilla movement feels really unique!!
Running around the arena, dodging enemies, and watching your weapons shred through waves of monsters is incredibly satisfying!!!
I can’t stop playing !!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much! We are thrilled to hear that you're enjoying the game. Keep running and gunning! 🦍🔫

reviews.review_description: Honestly didn't expect to like this so much. The roguelike upgrades are addictive and the movement is just fun. If you want a fast shooter where you can just go ape (literally), get this. One more round and I’m done... I promise.

reviews.review_title: Feels Like Gorilla Tag Meets a Roguelike
reviews.review_description: The core gameplay is pretty entertaining. I’ve only done a few runs so far and got knocked out pretty fast, but it definitely makes me want to jump back in and try again!
The learning curve is real, but mastering the swing-locomotion while dodging a massive swarm is so satisfying. This is the evolution of the Survivor genre.
Aiming while moving with your hands takes some skill, but once you get the hang of it, it's so addictive. Solid game!
Love swinging and dangling around, using lots of weapons, and drawing a gun like a gunslinger.
The rope swinging is surprisingly fun haha. It’s great for dodging enemies.
BRO THIS GAME IS SO FUN I KEPT FALLING AND SHOOTING EVERYTHING
I played this instead of doing homework
Intense hardcore game.. too much fun 😍

reviews.review_title: already fun but needs a few updates
reviews.review_description: requires few more things to make game alive
Fun concept, but takes a bit to get used to
TOOO MUCH FUNNNNNNNN
My kids tried it, then I tried it, now we’re all competing for high scores

developer_response.body: This makes our day! Love hearing that the whole family is involved. 🏆 Who is currently holding the high score record in the house? Better watch out, the kids learn fast! Thanks for playing!

reviews.review_description: Amazing game enjoying so far

developer_response.body: Thank you! We're super happy you're enjoying it. We have big updates (new maps and new Apes) coming soon, so stay tuned! 🍌

reviews.review_description: pew pew

developer_response.body: Simple and accurate! 🦍🔫 Pew pew back at you! Glad you're enjoying the chaos!
